faqs.answer: Our mouse extermination services in Edgewater typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety by using EPA-approved products and methods that are effective against mice while minimizing risk to your family and pets. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions and can customize treatments based on your household's needs.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your mouse extermination services in Edgewater?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If mice return within the warranty period, we'll come back and retreat your property at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing prevention plans to keep your Edgewater home mouse-free year-round.
